title: 2026-01-14 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 16.40
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-01-14: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 16.40/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-01-14, the score printed 16.40/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
